mapper.sql: select group_id, parent_id, ancestors, group_name, order_num, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from survey_enterprise_group
mapper.select: where group_name = #{groupName} and parent_id = #{parentId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select count(1) from survey_enterprise_group where del_flag = '0' and parent_id = #{groupId} limit 1
select count(1) from survey_enterprise_group_rel where group_id = #{groupId} limit 1
mapper.update: update survey_enterprise_group set del_flag = '2' where group_id = #{groupId}
